name: salesforce_to_canvas_integration
description: Reference one-way patient sync from Salesforce to Canvas. When a Salesforce record is flagged for sync, a configurable filter either applies the change automatically or holds it for a human, creating or updating the linked Canvas patient.

applications.name: Salesforce Integration
applications.description: Admin console for the Salesforce → Canvas patient sync plugin

protocols.description: Inbound webhook endpoint accepting the Salesforce deliberate sync HTTP Callout, intent sync or delete
OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow for the Salesforce External Client App
Status endpoint exposing inbound events bucketed into needs action, applied and skipped, connection state and field mapping
Admin console HTML page, served to any logged in staff and gated inside so a non admin sees a styled access page instead of raw JSON
Patient chart banner under the patient name linking to the patient's Salesforce record
On patient creation, writes the new Canvas patient id back to the linked Salesforce record over OAuth
